root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.remark, pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card) as as_id_card, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename, sc_mem_m_member_aml.aml_date, sc_mem_m_member_aml.aml_prename, sc_mem_m_member_aml.aml_name, sc_mem_m_member_aml.aml_surname, sc_mem_m_member_aml.aml_id, sc_mem_m_member_aml.aml_bookno, sc_mem_m_member_aml.aml_remark
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_member_aml where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card = sc_mem_m_member_aml.aml_id and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_member_aml.aml_date
